creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Lars Engels from comment #3)
> Created attachment 155349 [details]
> New shar file
> 
> New version of networkmgr.shar attached. I renamed the port, to prevent
> confusion with Linux version of networkmanager.
> There are also still some dependencies missing. I haven't dug deeper into
> this.
> 
> Code and documentation of the upstream sources could be improved. Maybe you
> could make the code a real fork and work collaboratively on it?

Ack! Sorry, Lars. I don't seem to have gotten the (mail) notices
regarding your replies, here.
Thanks! I'll have a look at the copy you've provided, and come back with something.

Thanks, again!

--Chris
